data.title: RedCloud will unveil new OS aiming to solve the $2Tn Global Inventory Gap in FMCG, impacting businesses worldwide.
data.description: Today in London, RedCloud Holdings plc (Nasdaq: RCT) disclosed their ongoing series of meetings and events to showcase their initiative aimed at addressing the $2 trillion Global Inventory Gap within the Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) sector. This gap significantly affects operations throughout the supply chain, consequently influencing the availability and pricing of goods for consumers worldwide.

data.title: Floor & Decor opens store in Lancaster, CA at 44765 Valley Central Way with 23 full-time & 10 part-time associates, led by April Barrera.
data.description: Atlanta-based Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND) has recently opened a new warehouse store in Lancaster's Antelope Valley region at 44765 Valley Central Way. The store, specializing in hard-surface flooring for both homeowners and professionals, is led by Chief Executive Merchant April Barrera. With approximately 23 full-time and 10 part-time associates, the store offers a wide range of flooring options.

data.title: Arbitrum (ARB) pushes towards $0.62 resistance, trading at $0.52 (+1.04%) with bullish signals and oversold conditions.
data.description: Arbitrum (ARB) is currently trading at $0.52, showing a 1.04% increase. The market is experiencing strong bullish momentum with indications of oversold conditions according to Arbitrum technical analysis. Additionally, important resistance tests are expected in the near future.

data.title: FibroBiologics touts fibroblast cells' therapeutic benefits over stem cells in opinion editorial, holds 270+ patents.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG), a clinical-stage biotechnology company, released an opinion editorial advocating for the use of fibroblast cells over stem cell therapies in treating chronic diseases. The company, which holds over 270 patents, focuses on developing therapeutics and cures using fibroblasts and fibroblast-derived materials. The publication highlights the scientific basis for the superiority of fibroblast cells in therapy.

data.title: TON Strategy Company repurchased 250,000 shares below asset value, initiating staking of $TON.
data.description: In Las Vegas, TON Strategy Company has reported the repurchase of more than 250,000 shares at prices lower than Treasury Asset Value per share. Additionally, the company has begun staking $TON.

data.title: Greenidge Generation raises cash tender offer price for Senior Notes due 2026 and extends Tender/Exchange Offer. (Characters: 106)
data.description: Pittsford, New York - Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. disclosed that they have amended and restated their concurrent tender and exchange offers to exchange or purchase, depending on the holder's choice, their existing 8.5% Senior Notes due 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: GREE, operates as a vertically integrated cryptocurrency datacenter and power generation firm. This move comes as part of the Tender/Exchange Offer, wherein Greenidge allows holders to exchange or sell their Old Notes.

data.title: APT price aiming for $4.80 resistance with 0.74% gains, currently at $4.50. Neutral RSI at 53 hints at breakout.
data.description: The Aptos (APT) token is currently priced at $4.50, showing a daily increase of 0.74%. This price point is nearing the upper resistance of the Bollinger Band indicator. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 53, indicating a neutral stance. This combination suggests the possibility of a forthcoming breakout for APT.
